retrieved_result: Homepage Who Are We? One Stop is a retail convenience business with over 850 shops and a key focus on being the best store for customers in the neighbourhood. Open 7 days a week One Stop aims to meet the needs of all its local customers. Since 2003 we have been a subsidiary of Tesco. With our stores situated
